title: Runtime Packaging Modes

included: next-step --format auto follows runtime_view in packaged runtime profiles
render-runtime-view blocked in JSON-only runtime packages

validation.repo_check: passed after source cleanup with PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1
runtime_smoke: runtime_view=json: next-step auto => format=json; no program.ordo.view packaged; render-runtime-view blocked
runtime_view=ordo-code: next-step auto => format=ordo-code with current_contract
runtime_view=json,ordo-code: explicit json and ordo-code next-step formats both pass

trust_model: JSON IR decides; Ordo-code explains; Session-trace proves.
known_limits: runtime_view modes change AI-facing projection policy, not the canonical runtime engine
json-ir remains mandatory in every runtime package
ordo-code-view is not a second source of truth
